series_description: Applications for licensure and license renewal for Medical Transportation Services and Vehicles.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain complete file for 3 years ; Electronic: Retain digital files permanent in offsite and onsite locations.

series_description: Documentation pertaining to complaints received by and investigations conducted by the Medical Transportation Board.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain digital files permanently in onsite and offsite locations ; Paper: If Board takes no action, destroy after decision has been published in approved board minutes. If board takes action, retain for 1 year after investigation is complete, no further action is pending, and decision has been approved in board minutes. Convert to digital files the destroy hard copy.
